heading: LLM Trace
subtitle: Session → Request → Messages → Raw. Full prompt/completion + raw bodies for debugging. Capture is opt-in on the gateway (ADR-0039).
notFound: No trace payloads found. Either capture is disabled on the gateway, or this session has no payloads within the retention window.
captureDisabled: Capture is disabled on the data plane. Enable trace.capture_payload.enabled in the gateway config to record message + raw bodies.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Sessions with trace payloads (aggregated from request_logs).

requests.title: Request List
requests.subtitle: Trace events for this session. Click a request to view its messages and raw bodies.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Normalized message array (the conversation the gateway routed on).
messages.empty: No messages captured for this request.

raw.title: Raw
raw.subtitle: Original client request + upstream response bodies (verbatim).

detail.notFound: No payload captured for this request (capture disabled, or the row expired).
